videoSnippet.title: It's about the King, Not The Queen! || Nodirbek vs Vincent || Super Rapid & Blitz Croatia 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Abdusattorov, Nodirbek (2686) - Keymer, Vincent (2627) 0-1
Grand Chess Tour: Super Rapid & Blitz Croatia 2026 (Chess.com) [03] 2026.07.01
A21 English, Kramnik-Shirov counterattack

1.c4 e5 2.Nc3 Bb4 3.Nd5 Be7 4.Nf3 d6 5.d4 e4 6.Nd2 f5 7.e3 Nf6 8.Nxe7 Qxe7 9.b4 O-O 10.Be2 a6 11.O-O Nc6 12.Rb1 Bd7 13.a4 Nd8 14.d5 Nf7 15.Bb2 Ne5 16.a5 Rae8 17.Qb3 Nfg4 18.h3 Qh4 19.f4 exf3 20.Bxf3 Nf6 21.Qc3 g5 22.Be2 g4 23.Qd4 Nh5 24.Nf3 Ng3 25.Nxh4 Nxe2+ 26.Kh2 Nxd4 27.Bxd4 Nxc4 28.Rfc1 Bb5 29.hxg4 fxg4 30.Kg3 Rf7 31.Re1 Nd2 32.Rbc1 Ne4+ 33.Kh2 Ref8 34.Kg1 Ng3 35.e4 Re8 36.e5 dxe5 37.Bxe5 Ne2+ 38.Rxe2 Bxe2 39.Bxc7 Re4 40.Bg3 Rc4 41.Re1 Rc2 42.d6 Kf8 43.Rb1 Rd2 44.Kh2 Ke8 45.Rc1 Rd1 46.Rc5 Rff1 47.Rc8+ Kd7 48.Rc7+ Ke6 49.Re7+ Kd5 50.Be5 Bb5 51.Kg3 Rfe1 52.Nf5 Rxe5 53.d7 Rd3+ 54.Kh4 Bxd7 55.Rxd7+ Kc4 56.Rc7+ Kb3 57.Kxg4 h5+ 58.Kf4 Rb5 59.Ne3 Kxb4 60.Ke4 Rd2 61.Rc1 Rd8 62.Nc4

0:01 Hello Everyone!
01:30 Game Starts!
02:30 Completely New Game (Rb1)
06:00 Pause the Video
14:00 IWITP 
14:25 Standings after Round 6
15:20 Legends of the Channel
